calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Sophia Andritsakis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Stanley Hung.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 20, 2010.
Declaration of Rhonda Hedges in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial - CCP Section 98 was filed on October 21, 2010, and served on defendant on October 19, 2010.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, November 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against defendant Stanley Hung as follows:

Principal - $13,865.61.
Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - 389.00.

Total - $14,254.61.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
